scripts.dev: concurrently "bun run --cwd gateway dev" "bun run --cwd examples/simple-chat dev"
scripts.dev:admin-full: concurrently "bun run --cwd gateway dev" "bun run --cwd examples/admin-ui dev"
scripts.build: bun run build:packages && bun run build:gateway && bun run build:examples
scripts.build:packages: bun run --cwd packages/core build && bun run --cwd packages/react build
scripts.build:examples: bun run --cwd examples/simple-chat build && bun run --cwd examples/admin-ui build
